attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
  'REV' ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
  COALESCE(DIA.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD , 'UNKNOWN') ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
  'UNKNOWN' LINE_TYPE_CD,
  NDCA.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
  NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
  NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   ,
  NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   ,
  NCR.FISCAL_ID DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
  NDCA.SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
  NDCA.BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY         BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
  NDCA.SHIP_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY  SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
  NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
  NDCA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
  NDCA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  NDCA.AR_TRX_KEY  , 
  NDCA.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY          SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY, 
  COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998) PRODUCT_KEY,
  NCR.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD ,
  -9999 AS DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY ,
  'ERP_ADJ' TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
  NULL CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
  'ADJ' TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
  CASE WHEN NCR.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG' THEN -7777 END BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
  EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
  NSOL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY  MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
  NULL PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,
  NSOL.REVENUE_TYPE_CODE  SERVICE_TYPE_CD,   
  NULL GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT ,
  NSO.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE  DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD ,
  NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/
  CASE WHEN NCR.GLOBAL_NAME  = 'CG' THEN -7777 END AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
  NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME   ,           
  NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD    , 
   -7777 AS  RU_BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
  NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM ,
  NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER SALES_REP_NUM ,
    NCR.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            ,
  NCR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD            ,
  NCR.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG               ,
  NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,
  NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      ,
  COALESCE ( NCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT,-999) AS POS_TRX_ID_INT  ,
 COALESCE(NCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,-999) AS  ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
  FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_NA_CG  NCR
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI  NDCA
   ON (NDCA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY = NCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
   AND NDCA.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN 
(SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME)
 IN ( 'CISCO NAT ADJUSTMENTS')  AND LANG = 'US'))
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
      ON (NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NDCA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )
  inner  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
   ON (NDCA.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY )    
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT
    ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_DIRECT_INDIRECT_ADJ_TYPE DIA
 ON DIA.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD = NDCA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD 

  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
    ON (NCR.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  ) 
 
  INNER  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL
    ON (NDCA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY )  
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  NFM
     ON ( NCR.FISCAL_ID=NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   *100) 
/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/	 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE= NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE	
/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/ 
 WHERE NCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT < 0
	 UNION ALL
	 
	 SELECT
  NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
  'REV' ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
  COALESCE(DIA.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD , 'UNKNOWN') ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
  'UNKNOWN' LINE_TYPE_CD,
  NDCA.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD,
  NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
  NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   ,
  NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   ,
  NCR.FISCAL_ID DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
  NDCA.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/  
  NDCA.BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY         BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
  NDCA.SHIP_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY  SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/  
  NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
  NDCA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
  NDCA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
  NDCA.AR_TRX_KEY  , 
  NDCA.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY          SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/ 
  COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-998) PRODUCT_KEY,
  NCR.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD ,
  -9999 AS DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY  ,
  'ERP_ADJ' TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
  NULL CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
  'ADJ' TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
  CASE WHEN NCR.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG' THEN -7777 END BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
  EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
 -999  MAJOR_LINE_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
  NULL PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,
  '' as  SERVICE_TYPE_CD,   
  NULL GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT ,
  'UNKNOWN'  DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD ,
  -999 WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY  ,
  CASE WHEN NCR.GLOBAL_NAME  = 'CG' THEN -7777 END AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY,
  'UNK' SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME   ,           
  NFM.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD    , 
   -7777 AS  RU_BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
  '-999' AS  SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM ,
  NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER SALES_REP_NUM ,
  NCR.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT            ,
  NCR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD            ,
  NCR.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG               ,
  NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY            ,
  NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD      ,
 COALESCE ( NCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT,-999) AS POS_TRX_ID_INT  ,
 COALESCE(NCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,-999) AS  ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
 
  FROM 
  $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_NA_CG  NCR
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI  NDCA
   ON (NDCA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY = NCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
   AND NDCA.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN 
(SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) IN ('CISCO NAT ADJUSTMENTS')  AND LANG = 'US'))
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
      ON (NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NDCA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_DIRECT_INDIRECT_ADJ_TYPE DIA
 ON DIA.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD = NDCA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD 
 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
    ON (NCR.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  ) 
 
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  NFM
     ON ( NCR.FISCAL_ID=NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   *100)  
	 WHERE NCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT>0

SELECT 
 WIADJ.BATCH_ID                       ,
 WIADJ.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID             ,
 WIADJ.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME           ,
 WIADJ.ACCOUNT_CLASS                  ,
 WIADJ.ACCOUNT_CODE                   ,
 WIADJ.ACCTD_AMOUNT                   ,
 WIADJ.ADJUSTMENT_ID                  ,
 WIADJ.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER              ,
 WIADJ.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE                ,
 WIADJ.AMOUNT                         ,
 WIADJ.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID            ,
 WIADJ.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID            ,
 WIADJ.CODE_COMBINATION_ID            ,
 WIADJ.COGS_PERCENT                   ,
 WIADJ.COMMENTS                       ,
 WIADJ.CONTEXT                        ,
 WIADJ.CREATED_BY                     ,
 WIADJ.CREATION_DATE                  ,
 WIADJ.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID                ,
 WIADJ.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID           ,
 WIADJ.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID       ,
 WIADJ.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG                ,
 WIADJ.EXTENDED_AMOUNT                ,
 WIADJ.EXTRACT_TYPE                   ,
 WIADJ.FISCAL_ID                      ,
 WIADJ.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG           ,
 WIADJ.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE             ,
 WIADJ.GES_UPDATE_DATE                ,
 WIADJ.GLOBAL_NAME                    ,
 WIADJ.GL_DATE                        ,
 WIADJ.GL_POSTED_DATE                 ,
 WIADJ.GROUPING_ID                    ,
 WIADJ.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID              ,
 WIADJ.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE          ,
 WIADJ.INVOICE_PERCENT                ,
 WIADJ.INVOICING_RULE_ID              ,
 WIADJ.LAST_UPDATED_BY                ,
 WIADJ.LAST_UPDATE_DATE               ,
 WIADJ.LATEST_RECORD_FLAG             ,
 WIADJ.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT                ,
 WIADJ.LINE_TYPE                      ,
 WIADJ.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID       ,
 WIADJ.ORDER_HEADER_ID                ,
 WIADJ.ORDER_LINE_ID                  ,
 WIADJ.ORDER_NUMBER                   ,
 WIADJ.ORG_ID                         ,
 WIADJ.LINE_PERCENT                   ,
 WIADJ.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID       ,
 WIADJ.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  ,
 WIADJ.QUOTA_FLAG                     ,
 WIADJ.REASON_CODE                    ,
 WIADJ.REBATE_AMOUNT                  ,
 WIADJ.REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID           ,
 WIADJ.REQUEST_ID                     ,
 WIADJ.RULE_START_DATE                ,
 WIADJ.SALESREP_ID                    ,
 WIADJ.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID           ,
 WIADJ.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID            ,
 WIADJ.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID            ,
 WIADJ.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID            ,
 WIADJ.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD                ,
 WIADJ.SPLIT_PERCENT                  ,
 WIADJ.TERRITORY_ID                   ,
 WIADJ.TRANSACTION_DATE               ,
 WIADJ.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE      ,
 WIADJ.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY           ,
 WIADJ.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID        ,
 WIADJ.TRX_DATE                       ,
 WIADJ.TRX_NAME                       ,
 WIADJ.TRX_NUMBER                     ,
 WIADJ.TRX_TYPE                       ,
 WIADJ.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE             ,
 WIADJ.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE            ,
 WIADJ.CREATE_DATETIME                ,
 WIADJ.ACTION_CODE                    ,
 'RI'    ,
 WIADJ.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY                ,
 WIADJ.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD          ,
 WIADJ.SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
 WIADJ.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
  WIADJ.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     ,
 WIADJ.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
          WIADJ.POS_TRX_ID_INT ,
		  WIADJ.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
WIADJ.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_NA_CG WIADJ
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
 ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = WIADJ.GLOBAL_NAME)
 WHERE 
 (
 NOT EXISTS 
  ( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = WIADJ.GLOBAL_NAME)
 OR NOT EXISTS
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB,
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI  NDCA
   WHERE (NDCA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY = WIADJ.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
   AND NDCA.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN
 (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) IN ( 'CISCO NAT ADJUSTMENTS')  AND LANG = 'US'))
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NDCA.SS_CD
  AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NDCA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
 OR NOT EXISTS
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO,
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI  NDCA
   WHERE (NDCA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY = WIADJ.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
   AND NDCA.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN 
(SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) IN ( 'CISCO NAT ADJUSTMENTS')  AND LANG = 'US'))
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NDCA.SS_CD
  AND NDCA.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
 OR NOT EXISTS
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
  WHERE WIADJ.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  ) 
 OR NOT EXISTS 
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCT
  WHERE NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = WIADJ.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
  AND NSCT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'    )
 OR NOT EXISTS 
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP_TV NESR
  WHERE NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER = WIADJ.SALES_REP_NUMBER
  AND NESR.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'    )
 OR NOT EXISTS 
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
  WHERE NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = WIADJ.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'    )
 
 OR NOT EXISTS
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL,
   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI  NDCA
   WHERE (NDCA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY = WIADJ.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
   AND NDCA.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) IN ( 'CISCO NAT ADJUSTMENTS')  AND LANG = 'US'))
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NDCA.SS_CD
  AND NDCA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ) 
 OR NOT EXISTS 
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  NFM
  WHERE WIADJ.FISCAL_ID=NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   *100) 
 OR NOT EXISTS 
  (SELECT 1 FROM  $$ETLVWdb.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA,
$$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGL,
  $$FINLGLVWdb.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI  NDCA
   WHERE NGL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NDCA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
   AND NDCA.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) IN ( 'CISCO NAT ADJUSTMENTS')  AND LANG = 'US')
  AND NGL.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER AND NDCA.ACCT_CLASS_CD = 'REVENUE') 
  ) 
AND  WIADJ.POS_TRX_ID_INT <  0  
UNION ALL

  SELECT 
 WIADJ.BATCH_ID                       ,
 WIADJ.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID             ,
 WIADJ.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME           ,
 WIADJ.ACCOUNT_CLASS                  ,
 WIADJ.ACCOUNT_CODE                   ,
 WIADJ.ACCTD_AMOUNT                   ,
 WIADJ.ADJUSTMENT_ID                  ,
 WIADJ.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER              ,
 WIADJ.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE                ,
 WIADJ.AMOUNT                         ,
 WIADJ.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID            ,
 WIADJ.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID            ,
 WIADJ.CODE_COMBINATION_ID            ,
 WIADJ.COGS_PERCENT                   ,
 WIADJ.COMMENTS                       ,
 WIADJ.CONTEXT                        ,
 WIADJ.CREATED_BY                     ,
 WIADJ.CREATION_DATE                  ,
 WIADJ.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID                ,
 WIADJ.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID           ,
 WIADJ.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID       ,
 WIADJ.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG                ,
 WIADJ.EXTENDED_AMOUNT                ,
 WIADJ.EXTRACT_TYPE                   ,
 WIADJ.FISCAL_ID                      ,
 WIADJ.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG           ,
 WIADJ.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE             ,
 WIADJ.GES_UPDATE_DATE                ,
 WIADJ.GLOBAL_NAME                    ,
 WIADJ.GL_DATE                        ,
 WIADJ.GL_POSTED_DATE                 ,
 WIADJ.GROUPING_ID                    ,
 WIADJ.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID              ,
 WIADJ.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE          ,
 WIADJ.INVOICE_PERCENT                ,
 WIADJ.INVOICING_RULE_ID              ,
 WIADJ.LAST_UPDATED_BY                ,
 WIADJ.LAST_UPDATE_DATE               ,
 WIADJ.LATEST_RECORD_FLAG             ,
 WIADJ.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT                ,
 WIADJ.LINE_TYPE                      ,
 WIADJ.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID       ,
 WIADJ.ORDER_HEADER_ID                ,
 WIADJ.ORDER_LINE_ID                  ,
 WIADJ.ORDER_NUMBER                   ,
 WIADJ.ORG_ID                         ,
 WIADJ.LINE_PERCENT                   ,
 WIADJ.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID       ,
 WIADJ.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  ,
 WIADJ.QUOTA_FLAG                     ,
 WIADJ.REASON_CODE                    ,
 WIADJ.REBATE_AMOUNT                  ,
 WIADJ.REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID           ,
 WIADJ.REQUEST_ID                     ,
 WIADJ.RULE_START_DATE                ,
 WIADJ.SALESREP_ID                    ,
 WIADJ.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID           ,
 WIADJ.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID            ,
 WIADJ.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID            ,
 WIADJ.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID            ,
 WIADJ.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD                ,
 WIADJ.SPLIT_PERCENT                  ,
 WIADJ.TERRITORY_ID                   ,
 WIADJ.TRANSACTION_DATE               ,
 WIADJ.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE      ,
 WIADJ.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY           ,
 WIADJ.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID        ,
 WIADJ.TRX_DATE                       ,
 WIADJ.TRX_NAME                       ,
 WIADJ.TRX_NUMBER                     ,
 WIADJ.TRX_TYPE                       ,
 WIADJ.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE             ,
 WIADJ.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE            ,
 WIADJ.CREATE_DATETIME                ,
 WIADJ.ACTION_CODE                    ,
 'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE                     ,
 WIADJ.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY                ,
 WIADJ.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD          ,
 WIADJ.SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
 WIADJ.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
 WIADJ.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     ,
 WIADJ.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
     WIADJ.POS_TRX_ID_INT ,
	 WIADJ.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
 
   ,WIADJ.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_NA_CG WIADJ
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
 ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = WIADJ.GLOBAL_NAME)
 WHERE 
 (
 NOT EXISTS 
  ( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = WIADJ.GLOBAL_NAME)
 OR NOT EXISTS
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB,
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI  NDCA
   WHERE (NDCA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY = WIADJ.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
   AND NDCA.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) IN ( 'CISCO NAT ADJUSTMENTS')  AND LANG = 'US'))
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NDCA.SS_CD
  AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NDCA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY)
  OR NOT EXISTS
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
  WHERE WIADJ.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  ) 
 OR NOT EXISTS 
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV NSCT
  WHERE NSCT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = WIADJ.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
  AND NSCT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'    )
 OR NOT EXISTS 
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP_TV NESR
  WHERE NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER = WIADJ.SALES_REP_NUMBER
  AND NESR.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'    )
 OR NOT EXISTS 
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
  WHERE NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = WIADJ.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'    )
 
 OR NOT EXISTS 
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  NFM
  WHERE WIADJ.FISCAL_ID=NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   *100) 
 OR NOT EXISTS 
  (SELECT 1 FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA,
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_CFI_ADJ_ACCOUNTING EOCAA,
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE NDCAT,
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI  NDCA
   WHERE  (NDCA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY = WIADJ.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
   AND NDCA.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) IN ( 'CISCO NAT ADJUSTMENTS')  AND LANG = 'US'))
  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NDCA.SS_CD
  AND EOCAA.ACCOUNTNO =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER AND EOCAA.ACCOUNT_TYPE = 'REVENUE')  
  )
  AND  WIADJ.POS_TRX_ID_INT >  0

SELECT 
 NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
 NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
 CASE WHEN (NSOL.SS_CODE = 'CG' AND NSO.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y') OR (NSO.SS_CODE <> 'CG')   THEN  CASE WHEN NSOTT_OLD.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG = '=' OR NSOTT_OLD.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE NSOTT_OLD.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG END 
   ELSE CASE WHEN NSOTT_NEW.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG = '=' OR NSOTT_NEW.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE NSOTT_NEW.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG END END
 as DV_REVENUE_FLG, 
 CASE WHEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID='SERVICE' THEN (CASE WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID= 'CHARGES' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'  END)
   ELSE 'N'  END DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 '=' AS DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG, 
   CASE  WHEN SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4)= 'MISC' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END DV_MISC_FLG,
 '=' AS DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,   
 CASE WHEN NCA.ERP_REVENUE_CUSTOMER_FLAG = 'I' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG     ,
 CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE ,1,2) ='41' THEN 'Y' 
   WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='42' THEN 'Y'
   WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,3)='433' THEN 'Y' 
   ELSE 'N'   END DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 '=' SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG  ,
 CASE WHEN NSOL.MAJOR_LINE_TYPE = 'MAJOR' THEN 'Y' 
      WHEN NSOL.MAJOR_LINE_TYPE = 'MINOR' THEN 'N'
      ELSE 'N' END MAJOR_LINE_FLG,
 NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
 CASE WHEN ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IS NULL OR NSTT.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'UNKNOWN'  OR NSTT.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE   <> 'CORP. REVENUE' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END  DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG_TEMP  
 FROM  
 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_NA_CG  NCR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI  NDCA
   ON (NDCA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY = NCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
   AND NDCA.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN
 (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) IN ( 'CISCO NAT ADJUSTMENTS')  AND LANG = 'US'))
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
  ON NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
 inner  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
  ON (NDCA.SALES_ORDER_KEY  = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
    AND NSO.END_TV_DATETIME =  '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
   )    

 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON ( NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL
   ON ( NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NDCA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY /* PRMADDAL: Changed as part of Q4FY17 SOT OA OPEN RMA SUBSKU*/
  --AND NSOL.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'  
  )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV ORD_LN_V
  ON(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = ORD_LN_V.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
  AND ORD_LN_V.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00')
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_TV NSOTT_NEW   /*     added as part of Cf LSS CR post Q3FY15 */
  ON ORD_LN_V.SO_LINE_TYPE_NAME=NSOTT_NEW.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
 AND NSOTT_NEW.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
 
 LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_TV  NSOTT_OLD   /*     added as part of Cf LSS CR post Q3FY15 */
 ON NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME=NSOTT_OLD.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
 AND NSOTT_OLD.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL
     ON (NSO.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = NECAL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_TV NCA
  ON (NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NECAL.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  AND NCA.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01')
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
  ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE      =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) 
  WHERE NCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT < 0
     UNION ALL

SELECT 
 NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
 NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' AND NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID ='CDBU' AND ELC.ENABLE_FLAG_NRT ='Y' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS DV_REVENUE_FLG  ,
  CASE WHEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID='SERVICE' THEN (CASE WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID= 'CHARGES' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'  END)
   ELSE 'N'  END DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 '=' AS DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG, 
   CASE  WHEN SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4)= 'MISC' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END DV_MISC_FLG,
 '=' AS DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,   
 'Y' AS  DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG     ,
 CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE ,1,2) ='41' THEN 'Y' 
   WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='42' THEN 'Y'
   WHEN SUBSTR(NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE,1,3)='433' THEN 'Y' 
   ELSE 'N'   END DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 '=' SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG  ,
'=' AS  MAJOR_LINE_FLG,
 NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
 CASE WHEN ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IS NULL OR NSTT.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'UNKNOWN'  OR NSTT.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE   <> 'CORP. REVENUE' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END  DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG_TEMP  
 FROM  
 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_NA_CG  NCR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI  NDCA
   ON (NDCA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY = NCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
   AND NDCA.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) IN ( 'CISCO NAT ADJUSTMENTS')  AND LANG = 'US'))
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
  ON NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
  AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
  ON ( NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = NCR.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID)
  LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY NPF      /* NP, NPF and ELC Joins added as part of Q2FY16 - CDBU - SA (Scientific Atlanta) Changes for CORP BOOKINGS FLAG, REVENUE RECOGNITION FLAG and NET SPREAD FLAG Columns */
   ON NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
  LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDBU ELC
  ON NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = ELC.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
  AND NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = ELC.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
  ON (NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE      =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) 	 
	 WHERE NCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT >0

SELECT 
 AFLAG.DV_REVENUE_FLG  ,              
 NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT   ,  
 NCR.GLOBAL_NAME  ,                 
 NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE BK_SS_CD     ,                 
 AAMT.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT    , 
 AAMT.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
 AAMT.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT   ,   
 AKEY.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD     ,         
 AKEY.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD  ,          
 AKEY.LINE_TYPE_CD  ,                
 CASE WHEN NCR.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG = 'R' AND NCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT>0 THEN  NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT*-1 ELSE NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT END SPLIT_PERCENT ,/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/
 CAST(NCR.GL_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) GL_DTM   ,                     
 CAST(NCR.GL_POSTED_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)) GL_POSTED_DTM   ,              
 CAST(NROL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) RULE_START_DTM  , /*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/             
 CASE WHEN NCR.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG = 'F' THEN 'FORWARD' ELSE 'REVERSE' END FORWARD_REVERSE_CD ,
 NCR.LATEST_RECORD_FLAG LAST_RECORD_FLG,         
 AKEY.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD    ,    
 AKEY.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD    , 
 AKEY.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   , 
 AKEY.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,    
 'FOR REVENUE REPORTING'   REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE     ,       
 AKEY.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
 AKEY.SALES_ORDER_KEY    ,           
 AKEY.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,         
 AKEY.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,         
 AKEY.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  ,         
 AKEY.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  ,/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/        
 AKEY.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  ,             
 AKEY.AR_TRX_KEY  ,                  
 AKEY.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  ,
 NCR.ORDER_NUMBER REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT  ,
 AKEY.PRODUCT_KEY   ,                
 AKEY.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD    ,      
 AFLAG.DV_CHARGES_FLG    ,            
 (CASE WHEN (AFLAG.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG = 'Y' 
         AND AFLAG.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG_TMP = 'Y')
  THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG   ,        
 '='  DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 AFLAG.DV_MISC_FLG   ,                
 '='  DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 AFLAG.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG    ,         
 AFLAG.DV_SERVICE_FLG  ,              
 AAMT.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT   ,   
 AAMT.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT  ,
 AAMT.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT  ,         
 AAMT.DV_EXTENDED_QTY   ,            
 AKEY.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    ,
 AFLAG.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG   ,       
 AKEY.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM    ,      
 AKEY.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  ,
 AKEY.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM   ,
 NULL SHIPPED_DT,                  
 AKEY.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD    ,       
 AKEY.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
 AAMT.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
 NULL INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME   ,     
 AKEY.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD   ,     
 AFLAG.MAJOR_LINE_FLG   ,             
 AKEY.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
 AKEY.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
 AKEY.SERVICE_TYPE_CD    ,           
 NULL CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT, 
 AAMT.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT   ,      
 AKEY.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT   ,  
 AKEY.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD   ,    
 AKEY.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY  , 
 AFLAG.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD   ,       
 AKEY.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY    ,       
 AKEY.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME   ,      
 AKEY.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD      ,      
 AKEY.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  , 
 AKEY.SALES_REP_NUM     ,            
 CAST(NCR.TRANSACTION_DATE AS DATE)   DV_FISCAL_DT ,
 NCR.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE ,
 NCR.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
 NCR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
 NCR.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
 NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
 NCR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD ,
 CASE  WHEN EVNGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL
 /*satchinn Lot2B changes 
    THEN CASE WHEN NCR.GLOBAL_NAME ='UO' THEN -996  ELSE -997 END */
    THEN CASE WHEN NCR.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG' THEN -995 END
    ELSE EVNGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
  END  as GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 COALESCE(SORR.NAME, 'UNKNOWN' ) AS  ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,     
 NCR.AMOUNT                ,        
 NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT ,
 AKEY.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 NROL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT  AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 AKEY.PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/
  NROL.ATTRIBUTION_CD AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 NCR.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT ,
   NCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT   ,
 NCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_NA_CG NCR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON (NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI  NROL
   ON (NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY = NCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
   AND NROL.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) IN ( 'CISCO NAT ADJUSTMENTS')  AND LANG = 'US'))
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_NA_ADJ_FLAG_CG AFLAG
     ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID= AFLAG.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID 
     AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = AFLAG.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_NA_ADJ_AMOUNT_CG AAMT
     ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID= AAMT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
     AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = AAMT.GLOBAL_NAME) 
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_NA_ACC_ADJ_KEY_CG AKEY
     ON (NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID= AKEY.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID 
     AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = AKEY.GLOBAL_NAME)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  EVNGLA
   ON ( NCR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = EVNGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID  
   AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = EVNGLA.GLOBAL_NAME)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_RA_RULES  SORR
 ON NCR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID = SORR.RULE_ID
 AND NCR.GLOBAL_NAME = SORR.GLOBAL_NAME

 EXADJ.BATCH_ID                       ,
 EXADJ.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID             ,
 EXADJ.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME           ,
 EXADJ.ACCOUNT_CLASS                  ,
 EXADJ.ACCOUNT_CODE                   ,
 EXADJ.ACCTD_AMOUNT                   ,
 EXADJ.ADJUSTMENT_ID                  ,
 EXADJ.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER              ,
 EXADJ.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE                ,
 EXADJ.AMOUNT                         ,
 EXADJ.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID            ,
 EXADJ.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID            ,
 EXADJ.CODE_COMBINATION_ID            ,
 EXADJ.COGS_PERCENT                   ,
 EXADJ.COMMENTS                       ,
 EXADJ.CONTEXT                        ,
 EXADJ.CREATED_BY                     ,
 EXADJ.CREATION_DATE                  ,
 EXADJ.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID                ,
 EXADJ.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID           ,
 EXADJ.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID       ,

 EXADJ.INVOICING_RULE_ID              ,
 EXADJ.LAST_UPDATED_BY                ,
 EXADJ.LAST_UPDATE_DATE               ,
 EXADJ.LATEST_RECORD_FLAG             ,
 EXADJ.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT                    ,
 EXADJ.LINE_TYPE                      ,
 EXADJ.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID       ,
 EXADJ.ORDER_HEADER_ID                ,
 EXADJ.ORDER_LINE_ID                  ,
 EXADJ.ORDER_NUMBER                   ,
 EXADJ.ORG_ID                         ,

 EXADJ.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID       ,
 EXADJ.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  ,
 EXADJ.QUOTA_FLAG                     ,
 EXADJ.REASON_CODE                    ,
 EXADJ.REBATE_AMOUNT                  ,
 EXADJ.REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID           ,
 EXADJ.REQUEST_ID                     ,
 EXADJ.RULE_START_DATE                ,
 EXADJ.SALESREP_ID                    ,
 EXADJ.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID           ,
 EXADJ.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID            ,
 EXADJ.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID            ,
 EXADJ.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID            ,
 EXADJ.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD                    ,
 EXADJ.SPLIT_PERCENT                  ,
 EXADJ.TERRITORY_ID                   ,
 EXADJ.TRANSACTION_DATE               ,
 EXADJ.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE      ,
 EXADJ.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY           ,
 EXADJ.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID        ,
 EXADJ.TRX_DATE                       ,
 EXADJ.TRX_NAME                       ,
 EXADJ.TRX_NUMBER                     ,
 EXADJ.TRX_TYPE                       ,
 EXADJ.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE             ,
 EXADJ.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE            ,
 EXADJ.CREATE_DATETIME                ,
 EXADJ.ACTION_CODE  ,
 EXADJ.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
 EXADJ.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD        ,
 EXADJ.SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
 EXADJ.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY       ,
  EXADJ.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     ,
 EXADJ.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT  ,
  EXADJ.POS_TRX_ID_INT ,
        EXADJ.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
   EXADJ.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
 FROM
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXNCR_REV_NA_CG EXADJ
 WHERE EXADJ.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'

SELECT 
  WI_RV.BATCH_ID,
  WI_RV.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
  WI_RV.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
  WI_RV.ACCOUNT_CLASS,
  WI_RV.ACCOUNT_CODE,
  WI_RV.ACCTD_AMOUNT,
  WI_RV.ADJUSTMENT_ID,
  WI_RV.ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
  WI_RV.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
  WI_RV.AMOUNT,
  WI_RV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
  WI_RV.BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
  WI_RV.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
  WI_RV.COGS_PERCENT,
  WI_RV.COMMENTS,
  WI_RV.CONTEXT,
  WI_RV.CREATED_BY,
  WI_RV.CREATION_DATE,
  WI_RV.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
  WI_RV.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
  WI_RV.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
  WI_RV.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
  WI_RV.EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
  WI_RV.EXTRACT_TYPE,
  WI_RV.FISCAL_ID,
  WI_RV.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
  WI_RV.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
  WI_RV.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
  WI_RV.GLOBAL_NAME,
  WI_RV.GL_DATE,
  WI_RV.GL_POSTED_DATE,
  WI_RV.GROUPING_ID,
  WI_RV.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
  WI_RV.INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
  WI_RV.INVOICE_PERCENT,
  WI_RV.INVOICING_RULE_ID,
  WI_RV.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
  WI_RV.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
  WI_RV.LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
  WI_RV.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
  WI_RV.LINE_TYPE,
  WI_RV.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
  WI_RV.ORDER_HEADER_ID,
  WI_RV.ORDER_LINE_ID,
  WI_RV.ORDER_NUMBER,
  WI_RV.ORG_ID,
  WI_RV.LINE_PERCENT,
  WI_RV.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
  WI_RV.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
  WI_RV.QUOTA_FLAG,
  WI_RV.REASON_CODE,
  WI_RV.REBATE_AMOUNT,
  WI_RV.REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
  WI_RV.REQUEST_ID,
  WI_RV.RULE_START_DATE,
  WI_RV.SALESREP_ID,
  WI_RV.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,
  WI_RV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
  WI_RV.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
  WI_RV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
  WI_RV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
  WI_RV.SPLIT_PERCENT,
  WI_RV.TERRITORY_ID,
  WI_RV.TRANSACTION_DATE,
  WI_RV.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE,
  WI_RV.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
  WI_RV.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
  WI_RV.TRX_DATE,
  WI_RV.TRX_NAME,
  WI_RV.TRX_NUMBER,
  WI_RV.TRX_TYPE,
  WI_RV.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
  WI_RV.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
  WI_RV.CREATE_DATETIME,
  WI_RV.ACTION_CODE,
  WI_RV.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
  WI_RV.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
   WI_RV.SALES_REP_NUMBER              ,
     WI_RV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
  WI_RV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     , 
  WI_RV.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT ,
  WI_RV.POS_TRX_ID_INT ,
       WI_RV.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
   WI_RV.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
 FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REVENUE_TRX_NA_P  WI_RV 
  WHERE WI_RV.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'NA_ADJ'
  AND WI_RV.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'

SELECT 
 NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
 NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
 /*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/	
 CAST(COALESCE( NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT * CAST(COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT, 
 CAST(COALESCE(NCR.AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100) /100 , 0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
 /*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/	
 0.0000000 AS  REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
  /*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/
 CAST( 
 COALESCE(CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG ,'N') = 'Y' THEN 0.0000000 ELSE
 CASE WHEN NCR.EXTRACT_TYPE = 'NA_ADJ' THEN 
  ((NDCA.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT - NDCA.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT  ) * COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1)  * COALESCE(CAST(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000))/100
  ELSE 0.0000000 END 
 END , 0.0000000)
 AS DECIMAL(26,7))  DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, /*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/
 0.0000000 DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
 0.0000000 DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
 0.0000000 DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
 0.0000000 DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
  0.0000000 DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_NA_CG NCR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI  NDCA
   ON (NDCA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY = NCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
   AND NDCA.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) IN
   ('CISCO NAT ADJUSTMENTS')  AND LANG = 'US')) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR 
 ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NDCA.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD
  AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD'
 AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = NDCA.GL_DT             
 AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate'  
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
  ON ( NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV 
  ON (NDCA.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT
  ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORDTV.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)
  WHERE  NCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT < 0  
                    UNION ALL
					
	       SELECT 
 NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
 NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
 CAST(COALESCE( NCR.ACCTD_AMOUNT * CAST(COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100.000000)/100 AS DECIMAL(26,7)),0.000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT, 
 CAST(COALESCE(NCR.AMOUNT * COALESCE(NCR.SPLIT_PERCENT,100) /100 , 0.0000000) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
 0.0000000 AS  REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
 CAST(   ((NDCA.RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT - NDCA.RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT  ) * COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1)* COALESCE(CAST(SCA.PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS DECIMAL(26,7)),100.0000000))/100
 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 0.0000000 DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
 0.0000000 DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
 0.0000000 DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
 0.0000000 DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
  0.0000000 DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_NA_CG NCR
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI  NDCA
   ON (NDCA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY = NCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
   AND NDCA.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) IN 
   ('CISCO NAT ADJUSTMENTS')  AND LANG = 'US')) 
INNER JOIN (SELECT PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,PD_SALES_REP_NUM,
/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/
PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, Sum(PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT) PD_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT FROM   $$STGDB.WI_POS_SC
/*Added as part of NAT_Enhacements Q4FY20-MAY Release*/
GROUP BY 1,2,3) SCA
ON NCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT=SCA.PD_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER=SCA.PD_SALES_REP_NUM
AND NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=SCA.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
				
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
  ON ( NCR.ACCOUNT_CODE =ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN    $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR 
 ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = NDCA.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD
  AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD'
 AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = NDCA.GL_DT             
 AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate'  
 WHERE NCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT >0
AND NCR.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG ='F'


UNION ALL
	       SELECT 
 NCR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID,
 NCR.GLOBAL_NAME,
 (NDRVD.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT* -1) AS GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT, 
 (NDRVD.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT* -1 ) AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
 0.0000000 AS  REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
 (NDRVD.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT * -1 ) AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 0.0000000 DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
 0.0000000 DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
 0.0000000 DV_EXTENDED_QTY,
 0.0000000 DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT,
  0.0000000 DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_NA_CG NCR
   INNER JOIN 
   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV NDRVD
   ON  NCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT=NDRVD.POS_TRX_ID_INT
   AND NCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=NDRVD.ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY 
AND NDRVD.LAST_RECORD_FLG='Y'
AND NDRVD.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD ='FORWARD'
AND NCR.SALES_REP_NUMBER=NDRVD.SALES_REP_NUM
                AND NCR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=NDRVD.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = NCR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI  NDCA
   ON (NDCA.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY = NCR.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
   AND NDCA.BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT IN (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) IN 
   ('CISCO NAT ADJUSTMENTS')  AND LANG = 'US')) 
WHERE NCR.POS_TRX_ID_INT >0
AND NCR.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG ='R'
